title: VanillaCraft+
description: Enhancements to Vanilla Minecraft focusing on a better, and more comfortable gameplay.
body:
# ❓ What's VanillaCraft+?
VanillaCraft+ is a modpack that will enhance the Vanilla gameplay that is given by Minecraft, with tweaks, utilities and much more. This modpack aims to make the Vanilla gameplay more comfortable, stable, and better. It is only Client-Side, which means you can use it on **any** servers.

# 📦 Additions
- Performance Tweaks
- Ambiance Tweaks
- UI Tweaks
- Music Player
- VR Support
- 3rd Person Changes
- Chat Tweaks
- Ability to invite anyone onto your singleplayer world
- Shaders Support
- Resourcepack/Shader browser integrated
- See what you're looking at
- Optimizations for better performances, and much more to discover.


**📜 Licensed Under Z-LIB**
